![][image1]![][image2]                                           \*\*\*เอกสารส่งเวชระเบียน  
**CAG Data Form**             ห้องสวนหัวใจ  โรงพยาบาลพญาไทศรีราชา  
**A. General information**  
	HCODE   **11855**		PID ………………………………			วัน/เดือน/ปีเกิด ...........................................................................  
	เพศ : 	⬜  ชาย		⬜  หญิง	Race ………………(\*\*Admission Date …………..….... **\*\*\*\*  โปรดระวัง check กับ ระบบให้ตรงกัน\*\*\* **   )                                                                       
**B. History and risk factors (Before CAG visit)**  
	Height ………………… cm.		Weight ………………… kg.			BMI …………………  
	Cerebrovascular disease  			⬜ No		⬜ Yes  
	Peripheral arterial disease			⬜ No		⬜ Yes  
	Hypertension							⬜ No		⬜ Yes  
	Dyslipidemia							⬜ No		⬜ Yes		LDL ………….. mg/dl		HDL ………….. mg/dl  
	DM									⬜ No		⬜ Yes  
	Current/ Recent (\< 2 year) smoker include electrical cigarette   		⬜ No		⬜ Yes  
	Prior MI								⬜ No		⬜ Yes  
	Aortic disease							⬜ No		⬜ Yes  
	Familial Hx of premature CVD		⬜ No		⬜ Yes  
**C. Clinical indication**  
	**C1 chronic coronary artery syndromes (CCS)**  
		1\.  Which group of CCS (choose only one)  
			⬜ suspicious CAD, stable syntromes, either with angina or dyspnea  
			⬜ new onset HF or LV dysfunction, suspicious CAD asymptomatic and symptomatic patients with stabilized symptoms \< 1 year after an ACS, or patients with recent revascularization  
			⬜ asymptomatic and symptomatic patients \> 1 year after initial diagnosis or revascularization  
			⬜ angina suspicious from vasospasm or microvascular CAD  
			⬜ no symptom but diagnose of CAD from screening  
		2\.  Indicaton for CAG in CCS (stable CAD)  
			⬜ Improve symptoms (medically refractory)  
				⚪ Antiplatelet …………………………………………………………			⚪ P2Y12I …………………………………………………………………				⚪ Beta blocker ………………………………………………………..		⚪ Calcium antagonist ………………………………………………				⚪ Nitrate ………………………………………………………………...		⚪ Statin ……………………………………………………………………				⚪ Ezetimibe …………………………………………………………….		⚪ PCSK9 inhibitors …………………………………………………..				⚪ ACEI …………………………………………………………………….		⚪ ARB ………………………………………………………………………   				⚪ Ranolazine …………………………………………………………..		⚪ Trimetazidine ……………………………………………………….				⚪ Other ………………………………………………………………………………………………………………………………………………………………..  
			⬜ Improve survival (high risk characters)  
				⚪ heart failure within 2 wks  
				⚪ low EF: 		⬜ \<35%			⬜ 36-50%			⬜ \>50%  
				⚪ \+ve EST (angina, STE/STD, hypotension) within 5 mets or low workload  
				⚪ large ischemic area from non-invasive imaging  
					⬜ echocardiogram			⬜ MRI			⬜ others (specify) ………………….  
				⚪ Having Hx of VT/VF either at rest or EST  
		3\.  Indication for PCI in CCS case  
			⬜ CCS with angina but no anatomic or physiologic criteria for revascularization. \-\> not recommend  
			⬜ CCS with normal LVF but had 1 or 2 CAD without significant proximal LAD stenosis. \-\> not recommend  
			⬜ CCS with ≥1 CAD with no anatomical (\<70% non LM or non-functional significant (FFR \> 0.8) \-\> not recommend  
			⬜ CCS with normal LVF but had significant proximal LAD stenosis, suitable anatomy  
			⬜ CCS with sig. 3-vv CAD, normal LVF \-\> CABG (No benefit for PCI)  
			⬜ CCS with multi-vv CAD with moderate LV systolic dysfunction, LVEF 35-50% \-\> CABG  
			⬜ CCS with selected sig. left main stenosis when PCI can provide resonable equivalent risk/result to CABG  
			⬜ CCS with significant left main stenosis, high anatomic complex CAD, CABG candidate \-\> CABG  
			⬜ CCS with multi-vessel CAD with severe LV systolic dysfunction, LVEF \< 35% \-\> CABG  
			⬜ CCS with angina but optimal Rx is unclear \-\> consult heart team  
					Result			⬜ medical Rx		⬜ PCI		⬜ CABG  
	**C2 Non-ST elevation acute coronary artery syndromes (NSTE-ACS)**  
		1\.  Diagnostic key  
			Having ischemic pain					⬜ Yes		⬜ No		(เป็นส่วน optional ที่ไม่จำเป็นต้องกรอก)คำจำกัดความในตาราง  
			Having ischemic ECG					⬜ Yes		⬜ No  
			Biomarker elevation					⬜ Yes (⚪ 1st  ⚪ 2nd )		⬜ neg		⬜ not done  
			R/O other causes of non-ACS		⬜ Yes		⬜ No		(เป็นส่วน optional ที่ไม่จำเป็นต้องกรอก)คำจำกัดความในตาราง  
			LVEF									⬜ \<35%	⬜ 36-50%		⬜ \>50%  
		2\.  Risk stratification  
			⬜ Very high :			⚪ shock/HF		⚪ hypotension 		⚪ VT/VF  เลือกได้มากว่า 1 ข้อ  
			⬜ High Grace risk score \> 140  
			⬜ Intermediate to low Grace risk score \< 140  
		3\.  CAG & Revascularization guideline for NSTE-ACS  
			⬜ NSTE-ACS case with cardiogenic shock, routine multivessel PCI of non-culprit lesions in the same setting. Should not be performed.  
			⬜ NSTE-ACS cases who have failed PCI and have ongoing ischemia, hemodynamic compromise, or threatened occlusion of an artery with substantial myocardium at risk. Who are appropriate candidates for CABG, emergency CABG is resonable  
			⬜ NSTE-ACS case who are initially stabilized with intermediate or low risk of clinical events, CAG with intent to perform revascularization is reasonable before hospital discharge to improve outcomes.  
			⬜ NSTE-ACS case who are intially stabilized with high risk of clinical events, early (\< 24 hrs) CAG is reasonable rather than delayed CAG to improve outcomes.  
			⬜ NSTE-ACS case with refractory angina or hemodynamic or electrical instability, an immediate CAG with intent for revascularization in indicated to improve outcomes.  
			⬜ NSTE-ACS with cardiogenic shock emergent CAG and revascularization, is recommended to reduce risk of death.  
			⬜ NSTE-ACS case with elevated risk of recurrent ischemic events and appropriate candidates for revascularization, CAG with the intent to proceed with revascularization is indicated to reduce cardiovascular events.

	**C3 ST elevation acute coronary artery syndromes (STE-ACS)**  
		1\.  Diagnostic key  
			Ischemic pain					⬜ Yes		⬜ No		(เป็นส่วน optional ที่ไม่จำเป็นต้องกรอก)คำจำกัดความในตาราง  
			ECG STE						⬜ anterior	⬜ lateral		⬜ inferior		⬜ RV (V3R, V4R)  
			Biomarker elevation			⬜ Yes (⚪ 1st  ⚪ 2nd )			⬜ neg			⬜ not done  
			R/O other diseases			⬜ aortic dissection		⬜ pulmonary emboli	⬜ myopericarditis  
											⬜ stress induce cardiomyopathy  
		2\.  Risk stratifying  
			⬜ Very high risk   	  
				⚪ cardiogenic shock		⚪ VT/VF arrest		⚪ 3rd degree AV block		⚪ trifasicular  
			⬜ High risk  
				⚪ hypotension			⚪ pulm. edema		⚪ 2nd degree AV block (Mobitz II)  
			⬜ Intermediate  
				⚪ HF						⚪ no pulm. edema  
			⬜ Low risk  
				⚪ V/S stable				⚪ no HF				⚪ STE normalize  
		3\.  Initial dicision for reperfusion  
			⬜ PCI if First Medical Contact (FMC) diagnosis to wire crossing \< 120 min  
			⬜ FMC diagnosis to wire crossing \> 120 min, thrombolysis\*\*\* first, and refer to PCI center  
			⬜ R/O severe allergic reaction to contrast media, thrombolysis\*\*\* first  
			⬜ PCI if very high-high risk  
			⬜ PCI if allergic to thrombolytic agent  
			⬜ PCI if having contra-indication for thrombolytic agent  
			⬜ Rescue PCI if failed thrombolytic agent

		

4\.  Revascularization guideline in STE-ACS case  
			⬜ ischemic symptoms for \< 12 hours, PCI should be performed to improve survival  
			⬜ cardiogenic shock or hemodynamic instability, PCI or CABG (when PCI is not feasible) is indicated to improve survival, irrespective of the time delay from MI onset.  
			⬜ mechanical complications (e.g. ventricular septal rupture, mitral valve insufficiency from papillary muscle infarction or rupture, or free wall rupture), CABG is recommended at the time of surgery, with the goal of improving survival.  
			⬜ evidence of failed reperfusion after fibrinolytic therapy, rescue PCI of the infarct artery should be performed to improve clinical outcomes.  
			⬜ treated with fibrinolytic therapy, angiography within 3 to 24 hours with the intent to perform PCI is reasonable to improve outcomes.  
			⬜ stable and presenting 12 to 24 hours after symptom onset, PCI is reasonable to improve clinical outcomes.  
			⬜ PCI is not feasible or successful, with a large area of myocardium at risk, emergency or urgent CABG can be effective as a reperfusion modality to improve clinical outcomes.  
			⬜ complicated by ongoing ischemia, acute severe heart failure, or life-threatening arrhythmia, PCI can be beneficial to improve clinical outcomes, irrespective of time delay from MI onset  
			⬜ Asymptomatic stable STEMI case who have a totally occluded infarct artery \> 24 hours after symptom onset and are without evidence of severe ischemia. PCI should not be performed  
			⬜ PCI of non-infarct A is not recommended (harmful) in cardiogenic shock case  
			⬜ STEMI case, emergency CABG should not be performed after failed primary PCI: In the absence of ischemia or a large area of myocardium at risk, or If surgical revascularization is not feasible because of a no-reflow state or poor distal targets.

	**C4 Cardiomyopathy (CMP)/ Congestive heart failure (CHF)**  
		1\.  Definition: Disorder of heart muscle (structurally and functionally abnormal) in the absence (CAD), hypertension, valve disease, and congenital heart disease (CHD)  
		2\.  Type  
			⬜ Dilated CMP: LV dilatation with global or regional systolic dysfunction unexplained solely by abnormal loading conditions (e.g. hypertension disease, CHD) or CAD  
			⬜ Hypertrophic CMP  
			⬜ Restrictive CMP  
			⬜ Stress induced CMP (Takotsubo syndrome)  
			⬜ Arrhythmogenic RV CMP  
			⬜ Other ………………………………………………………  
		3\.  Investigation  
			⬜ Ischemic ECG : 	⚪ Yes		⚪ No		⚪ not done  
			⬜ Echocardiogram  
				LVEF				⚪ \< 35%		⚪ 35-50%			⚪ \> 50%		⚪ not done  (เป็นส่วน optional จะกรอกหรือไม่กรอกก็ได้)  
				MRI				⚪ normal			⚪ abnormal			⚪ not done  
				EST					⚪ ischemia at low work load		⚪ Yes		⚪ No	เลือก 1ข้อ	(⚪ VT/VF		⚪ not done เลือก 1ข้อ)  
				CTA				⚪ Yes			⚪ not done  
		4\.  If CAG was performed, what do you plan next, according to current guideline  
 			⚪ No		⚪ Yes (result below)  ⬜ Consult heart team\*		  
			                                                                              ⬜ Medical Rx																							                                                                                       ⬜ CABG  
			                                                                               ⬜ PCI

			

	

**C5 Pre-operative assessment of CAD**  
		1\.  Diagnosis  
			⬜ Hx of CAD						⚪ Yes (specify) …………………………	⚪ No  
			⬜ Valvular heart disease		⚪ AVS/AVR		⚪ MVS/MVR		⚪ TVS/TVR		⚪ PVS/PVR  
			⬜ Congenital HD					⚪ ASD				⚪ VSD				⚪ others …………………………….  
			⬜ Pre-post cardiac transplant  
		2\.  Investigation  
			⬜ Ischemic ECG: 		⚪ Yes		⚪ No		⚪ not done  
			⬜ Echocardiogram  
				LVEF				⚪ \< 35%		⚪ 35-50%			⚪ \> 50%		⚪ not done  (เป็นส่วน optional จะกรอกหรือไม่กรอกก็ได้)  
				MRI				⚪ normal			⚪ abnormal			⚪ not done  
				EST					⚪ ischemia at low work load		⚪ Yes		⚪ No	เลือก 1ข้อ	(⚪ VT/VF		⚪ not done เลือก 1ข้อ )  
				CTA				⚪ Yes			⚪ not done  
		3\.  If CAG was performed, what do yor plan next, according to current guideline?  
			⚪ No		⚪ Yes (result below)  ⬜ Consult heart team\*		  
			                                                                              ⬜ Medical Rx																							                                                                                       ⬜ CABG  
			                                                                               ⬜ PCI

	**C6 Post cardiac arrest**  
		1\.  STE																							(เป็นส่วน optional จะกรอกหรือไม่กรอกก็ได้)  
			⚪ With STE		⚪ Without STE  
			Among patients with resuscitated out-of-hospital cardiac arrest without ST-segment elevation, a strategy of performing immediate angiography no benefit over a delayed or selective strategy with respect to the 30-day risk of death from any cause  
		2\.  If CAG was performed, what do you plan next, according to current guideline?		(เป็นส่วน optional จะกรอกหรือไม่กรอกก็ได้)  
			⬜ Consult heart team\*		⚪ No		⚪ Yes (result below)  
			⬜ Medical Rx																				  
			⬜ CABG  
			⬜ PCI

**I. CAG Procedure, findings and complications**  
	Date of CAG ……………………………………………**( มากกว่าหรือเท่ากับวัน admission date )**  
	Pre-CAG Risk  	⚪ very high (OR \> 3\)		⚪ high (OR 2-3)		⚪ intermediate (OR 1-2)		⚪ low OR ≤ 1  
	Risk reduction intervention before CAG		⚪ Yes				⚪ No  
	Responsible Physician : Name ……………………………………………		MD licence N. ว. …………………………………………..  
	Filler person : Physician Name ……………………………………………		RN/ Technician name …………………………………..  
	Access site : 		⚪ femoral			⚪ radial		⚪ brachial		⚪ other …………………………………………………. เลือก 1 ข้อ  
	Lesions : 			⚪ 1-vv CAD		⚪ 2-vv CAD	⚪ 3-vv CAD		⚪ LM disease   ⚪ non obstructive coronary artery

	Location No. (from figure)																	(เป็นส่วน optional จะกรอกหรือไม่กรอกก็ได้)  
		% stenosis \* Gensini range		⚪ 1-25%		⚪ 26-50%			⚪ 51-75%		⚪ 76-90%		⚪ 91-99%		⚪ 100%  
		% stenosis \* Gensini range		⚪ 1-25%		⚪ 26-50%			⚪ 51-75%		⚪ 76-90%		⚪ 91-99%		⚪ 100%  
		% stenosis \* Gensini range		⚪ 1-25%		⚪ 26-50%			⚪ 51-75%		⚪ 76-90%		⚪ 91-99%		⚪ 100%  
		% stenosis \* Gensini range		⚪ 1-25%		⚪ 26-50%			⚪ 51-75%		⚪ 76-90%		⚪ 91-99%		⚪ 100%  
		% stenosis \* Gensini range		⚪ 1-25%		⚪ 26-50%			⚪ 51-75%		⚪ 76-90%		⚪ 91-99%		⚪ 100%

Complications :			⚪ No				⚪ Yes  
		⬜ death after CAG				⚪ \< 24 hrs		⚪ \> 24 hrs  
		⬜ stroke after CAG				⚪ \< 24 hrs		⚪ \> 24 hrs  
		⬜ ARF after CAG					⚪ \< 24 hrs		⚪ \> 24 hrs  
			Creatinine before CAG ……….. mg/dl		after CAG ………… mg/dl 			⚪ require dialysis  
		⬜ allergic reaction				⚪ anaphylaxis 	⚪ not severe  
		⬜ hematoma						⚪ \< 24 hrs		⚪ \> 24 hrs		⚪ blood transfusion  
		⬜ perforation  (site ……………………………………………….….)  
		⬜ dissection  (site …………………………………………………….)  
		⬜ ACS								⚪ STE				⚪ NSTE	เลือก 1 ข้อ						(เป็นส่วน optional จะกรอกหรือไม่กรอกก็ได้)  
		⬜ shock							⚪ cardiogenic	⚪ hypovolemic เลือก 1 ข้อ  
		⬜ bradycardic arrest				⚪ VT/VF			⚪ AVB เลือก 1 ข้อ  
		⬜ bleeding 						⚪ intra-peritoneal		⚪ GI			⚪ blood transfusion  
		⬜ other ………………………………………………………………

2\.  Complications	 :						⚪ No				⚪ Yes   
		⬜ death after PCI				⚪ \< 24 hrs		⚪ \> 24 hrs  
		⬜ stroke after PCI				⚪ \< 24 hrs		⚪ \> 24 hrs  
		⬜ ARF after PCI					⚪ \< 24 hrs		⚪ \> 24 hrs  
			Creatinine before PCI ……….. mg/dl		after PCI ………… mg/dl 			⚪ require dialysis  
		⬜ hematoma						⚪ \< 24 hrs		⚪ \> 24 hrs		⚪ need blood transfusion  
		⬜ perforation  (site ……………………………………………….….)  
		⬜ dissection  (site …………………………………………………….)  
		⬜ no reflow						⚪ ACS			(	⚪ STE				⚪ NSTE	)เลือกข้อใดข้อหนึ่ง  
		⬜ shock							⚪ cardiogenic	⚪ hypovolemic  
		⬜ bradycardic arrest				⚪ VT/VF			⚪ AVB เลือกข้อใดข้อหนึ่ง
